mapper.select: SELECT s.*, p.title AS performance_title, p.venue_name AS venue, p.venue_id, p.status AS performance_status, p.approval_status FROM schedule s JOIN performance p ON s.performance_id=p.performance_id WHERE s.performance_id=#{performanceId} ORDER BY s.show_date, s.show_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule (performance_id, show_date, show_time, available_seats, status) VALUES (#{performanceId}, #{showDate}, #{showTime}, 0, 'AVAILABLE')
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET available_seats=#{count} WHERE schedule_id=#{scheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, p.title AS performance_title, p.venue_name AS venue, p.venue_id, p.status AS performance_status, p.approval_status FROM schedule s JOIN performance p ON s.performance_id=p.performance_id WHERE s.schedule_id=#{scheduleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET available_seats=available_seats-#{count} WHERE schedule_id=#{scheduleId} AND available_seats >= #{count}
UPDATE schedule SET available_seats=available_seats+#{count} WHERE schedule_id=#{scheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, p.title AS performance_title, p.venue_name AS venue, p.venue_id, p.status AS performance_status, p.approval_status FROM schedule s JOIN performance p ON s.performance_id = p.performance_id WHERE p.venue_id = #{venueId} ORDER BY s.show_date, s.show_time

SELECT s.*, p.title AS performance_title, p.venue_name AS venue, p.venue_id, p.status AS performance_status, p.approval_status FROM schedule s JOIN performance p ON s.performance_id = p.performance_id WHERE p.venue_id = #{venueId} AND s.show_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY s.show_date, s.show_time LIMIT #{limit}
